primary_diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia, common B-ALL type, ID 03/2024
At initial diagnosis:
Peripheral blood: Hb 8,2 g/dl, Plt 12/nl, Leukocytes 2,8/nl, 15% blasts
Bone marrow:
Cytology: 72% blasts
Histology: 90% blasts of a B-ALL. CD79a+, CD10+,
CD34+, TdT+, CD20(+) Ki-67 85%. Bcl6- CD23- CyclinD1- CD5- MPOFACS: CD45 low, SSC low,
CD34+, CD19+, CD10++
FACS: ED-LAIP (55 %): CD45 low, SSC low, CD34+, CD19+, CD10+, CD22+
Molecular genetics: BCR-ABL1 not detectable
Histology (reference pathology): 65 % infiltration B-lymphoblastic leukemia; MF-1
question: Treatment recommendation?
tumor_board_decision:
Relapse therapy with Inotuzumab ozogamicin; parallel intrathecal triple therapy for
treatment of the ZNS-Manifestation, after of a Cycle Inotuzumab systemic CNS-active
therapy (HD-MTX i.v. depending on general condition and blood count with or without
HD-Cytarabin); subsequently Continuation of therapy with Inotuzumab. CD19-CAR /
Allo-SCT to be considered.
raw_vignette:
Age: 60
ECOG: 2
Primary diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia, common B-ALL type, ID 03/2024
At initial diagnosis:
Peripheral blood: Hb 8,2 g/dl, Plt 12/nl, Leukocytes 2,8/nl, 15% blasts
Bone marrow:
Cytology: 72% blasts
Histology: 90% blasts of a B-ALL. CD79a+, CD10+,
CD34+, TdT+, CD20(+) Ki-67 85%. Bcl6- CD23- CyclinD1- CD5- MPOFACS: CD45 low, SSC low,
CD34+, CD19+, CD10++
FACS: ED-LAIP (55 %): CD45 low, SSC low, CD34+, CD19+, CD10+, CD22+
Molecular genetics: BCR-ABL1 not detectable
Histology (reference pathology): 65 % infiltration B-lymphoblastic leukemia; MF-1
Secondary diagnoses:
Allergies: none
Treatment and course:
Currently:
Relapse of the common B-ALL
Bone marrow aspiration from 03.07.2025:
Cytology: 5% blasts
FACS: 22% blasts, Immunophenotype: CD34+, CD19+, CD10+, CD20-, CD22+, CD38+, TdT+,
CD33-, CD13-
Lumbar puncture from 08.07.2025:
Cytology: 1500 cells/µl, Detection of blasts
FACS: 90% blasts
Initiation of local therapy with intrathecal triple therapy 3x/week from the
10.07.2025
Initiation of systemic therapy with of a Dexamethason pre-phase therapy analogous the
GMALL recommendations
Newly developed motor impairments
Question for the tumor board:
Treatment recommendation?
Tumor board decision:
Relapse therapy with Inotuzumab ozogamicin; parallel intrathecal triple therapy for
treatment of the ZNS-Manifestation, after of a Cycle Inotuzumab systemic CNS-active
therapy (HD-MTX i.v. depending on general condition and blood count with or without
HD-Cytarabin); subsequently Continuation of therapy with Inotuzumab. CD19-CAR /
Allo-SCT to be considered.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
22.01.24 Start Pre-phase with Dexamethason and Cyclophosphamid (each 200 mg/qm) after
GMALL
28.01.24 Induction I based on the GMALL-protocol 07/2003 for BCR-ABL1 negative ALL
without
Rituximab and PEG-Asparaginase, liposomal Doxorubicin
Received: MTX 15 mg i. t. (Day 6), days 6+7, days 13+14
07.03.24 Remission assessment (Bone marrow aspiration)
Cytology: 3 % blasts
FACS: blasts with unremarkable immunophenotype, no definite evidence of MRD positivity
FACS/Molecular genetics/Classical cytogenetics and FISH:
MRD neg.
11.03.24 1. Cycle Blinatomumab

25.04.24 2. Cycle Blinatomumab
02.06.24 Remission assessment (Bone marrow aspiration)
Cytology: 2% blasts
FACS: no definite evidence of MRD positivity
20.06.24 3. Cycle Blinatomumab
08.08.24 Remission assessment (Bone marrow aspiration)
Cytology: 3% blasts
FACS: no definite evidence of MRD positivity
09.09.24 &
22.09.24 Consolidation II (Part 1 and 2) analogous GMALL in dose reduction
MTX 1000mg/m2 (d1, d15), PEG-Asp 500 U/m2 (d2, d16), 6-MP 25mg/m2 d1-7 and
d15-21
26.10.2024 Remission assessment (Bone marrow aspiration)
Cytology: 3% blasts
FACS: blasts with unremarkable phenotype, no definite evidence of MRD positivity
MRD: negative
03.11.2024 -
07.11.2024 Consolidation III analogous GMALL
Cytarabin 1000mg/m2 (d1, d3, d5), Cyclophosphamid 200mg/m2 (d1,d3,d5
24.11.2024 Consolidation IV analogous GMALL
MTX 1,5g/m2 iv. PEG-Asp.500U/m2, 6MP 25mg/m2.
MTX 15mg absolute, Cytarabin 40mg absolute, Dexa 4mg absolute
08.12.2024 Continuation Consolidation IV d15
30.12.24 Consolidation V analogous GMALL
Cytarabin 1000mg/m2 (d1, d3, d5), Cyclophosphamid 200mg/m2 (d1,d3,d5)
23.01.25 Consolidation VI analogous GMALL
MTX 1,5g/m2 iv. PEG-Asp.500U/m2, 6MP 25mg/m2.
MTX 15mg absolute, Cytarabin 40mg absolute, Dexa 4mg absolute (intrathecal)
08.02.25 GMALL Consolidation VI d15
MTX 1,5g/m2 iv. PEG-Asp.500U/m2, 6MP 25mg/m2 (08.02. - 14.02.2025)
02.03.25 Start of the Maintenance therapy
Remission assessment (Bone marrow aspiration)
Cytology: 2% blasts
FACS: MRD negative
MRD: negative
01.03.25 Remission assessment
Cytology (BM): 4% blasts
FACS: blasts with unremarkable immunophenotype, no definite evidence of MRD positivity
FACS/Molecular genetics/Classical cytogenetics and FISH:
MRD neg.
================================================================================
